canonical.label: Canonical structured data
canonical.retentionPolicy: 7 years minimum; legal hold may extend
canonical.notes: Excludes submissionInbox (quarantine tier). Subcollections export with parent.

evidence.label: Evidence metadata and provenance
evidence.retentionPolicy: 7 years minimum; align with evidence provenance obligations

audit.label: Append-only audit and outbox
audit.retentionPolicy: Immutable; 7+ years; never shortened without legal review

publication.label: Release manifests and activation pointer
publication.retentionPolicy: Indefinite for active/superseded/rolled_back releases; draft/preview 90 days
publication.manifestVerification: BB-019 signed manifest + sha256 envelope required on restore

public.label: Released projections and search index
public.retentionPolicy: Indefinite per release; immutable snapshots in GCS

quarantine.label: Submission inbox (short TTL)
quarantine.retentionPolicy: Operational recovery only; not part of long-term archive

lifecycleRules.notes: Daily tier-tagged copies roll off after cross-check against weekly full
On-release exports retained per publication tier policy
